name: Observation Records of My Fiancée: The Misadventures of a Self-Proclaimed Villainess
original_name: 自称悪役令嬢な婚約者の観察記録。
overview: Crown prince Cecil was so brilliant that everything in life was easy to the point of boring him, then one day, his fiancée Bertia suddenly said "Prince Cecil, I am a villainess!" Claiming that this world is the same as that of an "otome game" from her past life and that she is playing the role of the "villainess" in it, she aims to play her part well and have their engagement annulled. With that goal in mind, she sets about causing turmoil in Cecil's daily life.

trailers.title: An Observation Log of My Fiancée Who Calls Herself a Villainess | Official Trailer | Crunchyroll
